# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: default-mtls-permissive
  namespace: istio-system # Apply this globally for the entire mesh
spec:
  host: "*.local" # Applies to all services within the mesh
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: PERMISSIVE # Enables mTLS where possible but allows plain text for backward compatibility

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: example-service-vs
  namespace: default # Replace with the namespace of your service
spec:
  hosts:
  - example-service # Replace with the actual hostname of your service
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: example-service # Replace with the actual hostname of your service
        port:
          number: 80 # Replace with the actual port of your service
